What We Do

Services Built Around
Your Vision

🏠

Interior Painting

Flawless interior finishes for every room. We prep, prime, and paint with care — protecting your furniture and floors throughout the process.

🏗️

Exterior Painting

Weather-resistant exterior coatings that protect your home and boost curb appeal. We work with all surfaces — stucco, wood, brick, and more.

🏢

Commercial Painting

Efficient, professional painting for offices, retail spaces, and multi-unit properties — on schedule, on budget, with minimal disruption.

🎨

Cabinet Refinishing

Give your kitchen or bathroom a fresh look without the cost of replacement. Smooth, durable finishes that look factory-new.

🔧

Deck & Fence Staining

Protect and beautify your outdoor wood with professional staining and sealing. We prep every surface for maximum adhesion and longevity.

✨

Drywall & Texture

From small patches to full walls, we repair and texture drywall to seamlessly match your existing surfaces before painting.

Why Clients Choose
Bojorquez

We're not just painters — we're craftsmen who take pride in every stroke. Eric Bojorquez founded this company on a simple belief: do the job right, treat people with respect, and the business takes care of itself.

500+ Projects
Completed
15+ Years in
Business
100% Satisfaction
Guaranteed

Meticulous Prep Work

We spend the time others skip — sanding, patching, priming — because that's what makes the finish last.

Clean Jobsites, Every Time

We protect your space and leave it cleaner than we found it. No exceptions, no shortcuts.

Honest, Transparent Pricing

Detailed written estimates with no hidden fees. What we quote is what you pay.

On-Time, Every Project

We respect your schedule. We show up when we say we will and finish when we commit to.
